notes: Library card sections completed for parent choice: reading, vocabulary, journals, writing, questions, informational text, and assessments.
Created from local 4th grade source folder audit.
Local 4th grade source folder includes a 24-chapter Oz adaptation, workbook, vocabulary guide, comprehension questions, and image/PDF assets.

book.title: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz
book.description: Local 4th grade source folder includes a 24-chapter Oz adaptation, workbook, vocabulary guide, comprehension questions, and image/PDF assets. This card now includes complete weekly library sections for Grade 4 use.

weeks.title: Week 1: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz Part 1 (Days 1-5)
vocabulary: Home: identify and explain the word in context
precise evidence: choose a quotation that supports an answer
transition words: connect events and ideas clearly
journal: What does this week's reading show about Home? Use one scene as evidence.
Choose one character decision from Chapters 1-4. Would you make the same choice? Explain why.
writing: Write an ACE paragraph answering one comprehension question with text evidence.
Draft a short narrative response connected to this week's reading.
questions: What problem or conflict matters most in Chapters 1-4?
Which detail best reveals a character trait, motivation, or change?
How does the setting affect what happens in this section?
What lesson, theme, or big idea is starting to develop?
assessment: Weekly vocabulary check, comprehension response, and short written reflection.
Review day: revise one journal response into a polished paragraph.
